subcodes.first_line: O My handmaidens in Ḥadbá! Verily, My Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of you whilst sorrows have encompassed it from those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امائی فی الحدباء ان قلمی الاعلی یذکرکن اذ احاطته الاحزان من الذین بهم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
